text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The question—'You want to go up? You want to stay up?'—hangs in the air as both invitation and challenge. I am drawn into this curious exhibit space, my mind stirred by the vibrant colors and vivid screens. The philosophical urge to ascend is strong, but so is the desire to remain, to linger with questions and observe. I sense I'm on the edge of discovery, torn between exploration and contemplation.
